onboarding.languageHelp: You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.gpsBody: We use your precise location to find nearby matches. You can control visibility.
onboarding.summaryBody: Write a short summary (at least 20 characters).
onboarding.summaryPlaceholder: e.g., I can help with calculus tutoring in Tamil and English.
onboarding.doneBody: You can update your profile anytime in Settings.
privacy.tldr: We collect only what’s needed (account, GPS for matching, your short profile, trust signals). Messages are end‑to‑end encrypted. Real name/photo are hidden by default. Intros require consent. No data sales or ad tracking. You control settings and can delete your data.
warning.noBackend: Running without backend credentials. Network features (AI, chat) are disabled.
